suggestions: Fix truncated subtasks: Task 8 subtask 8013 (Cloudflare Pages deployment) and Task 10 subtask 10015 (quality.yml workflow) have details fields that are cut off mid-sentence — these must be completed before implementation begins, as agents cannot implement from incomplete specifications.

Split Task 5 subtask 5007 into at least three separate subtasks: (1) JWT middleware, (2) health/metrics endpoints, (3) GDPR endpoints + K8s manifest. Currently it spans four distinct architectural concerns (auth middleware, observability, data privacy, and infrastructure manifests) which violates single-responsibility and makes it difficult for one agent to implement and test atomically.

Surface the JWT key distribution mechanism (shared secret vs JWKS) as a top-level cross-cutting decision point rather than repeating it per-service (Tasks 4, 5, 6 each mention it independently). This is an architectural decision that affects all services uniformly and should be resolved once in Task 1 or as a global decision point, then referenced by downstream tasks.

Split each large service build (RMS id=3, Finance id=4, Social Engine id=6) into 2–3 shippable vertical slices with an early deployable milestone: (a) skeleton service + migrations + health/metrics + one core endpoint, (b) core domain CRUD, (c) integrations/background jobs/GDPR. Make each slice independently deployable and testable in-cluster so you can integrate Morgan/Website earlier without waiting for the full feature matrix.

Fix dependency ordering to create parallel tracks and earlier working software: allow Morgan (id=7) to start after minimal endpoints exist (health + one tool per service) rather than full completion of ids 2–6; allow Website (id=8) to start after Equipment Catalog read endpoints and Morgan widget stub exist; add explicit dependencies from service build tasks (2–6) to their required infra outputs (ConfigMap/secrets naming, CNPG secret names) instead of only depending on infra mega-task id=1.

Complete and normalize decision points and gating: add explicit decision points (with options) for auth/JWT distribution (shared secret vs JWKS/IdP) used by all services, Signal number management (separate Signal vs Twilio numbers), and R2/S3 credential/endpoint conventions; then create small “decision resolution” tasks that must complete before implementing JWT middleware, Signal integration, and WAL archival. Also fill in any incomplete subtasks (e.g., id=10 subtask 10015 has empty details) or remove them to avoid plan dead-ends.

Collapse CiliumNetworkPolicy subtasks 10004-10009 into 2 tasks: one for data-plane services (catalog, RMS, finance, vetting, social) and one for Morgan/cloudflared — each policy follows the same template and the current 6-task split inflates the plan without adding clarity or enabling meaningful parallelism that isn't already present.

Subtask 10003 (scale Valkey to 2 replicas) and 10002 (CNPG scale to 2 + WAL archival) should be merged into a single 'Scale stateful dependencies' task — scaling Valkey is a 5-line manifest change and does not justify independent task overhead; WAL archival config is the only substantive work in 10002 and can carry both.

Task 8013 (Cloudflare Pages deployment) has truncated content in the details field ending mid-TOML — this subtask is incomplete and will block the website deployment; the wrangler.toml and GitHub Actions workflow body must be filled in before the task is executable.
